page_title: Ni-sen Nen... Moshiku wa... Ni-man Nen-go no Kimi e...
text:
is the theme song for Special 2 as well as for the fifth compilation movie, Attack on Titan: THE LAST ATTACK, composed and performed by of .

Lyrics
 

Complete version

 
 

Video clips

Trivia

Although not credited, the song features Mikasa's voice actress and Eren's voice actor .
The section of the song sung by Yui Ishikawa is a reference to a previous Linked Horizon song about Mikasa, "13 no Fuyu."
The lyric "Not knowing the names of the mourning flowers (Tomurai no hana no namae mo shirazu)" is a reference to the lyric "Unknown are the names of the flowers that have been trampled (Fumareta hana no namae mo shirazu ni)" from Feuerroter Pfeil und Bogen.
The verse which introduces Revo in the song is a reference to the ending of Season 3 Part 1, "Requiem der Morgenröte."
The song references "Feuerroter Pfeil und Bogen" during the verse sung by Revo.
"Saigo no Kyojin" is briefly referenced in the outro as well.
The lyrics "The world has broken the boy's sword" mirror the lyrics to Feuerroter Pfeil und Bogen, which say "the boy will pick up the black sword. "
This is the only credits song to be played in its entirety in the anime, rather than a TV size version.
